featureTitle: Phase 24 — Imaging Enterprise Hardening + Device Onboarding
keyFeaturesDelivered: Break-glass emergency access (patient-scoped, time-limited, max 4hr TTL)
SHA-256 hash-chained imaging audit trail (15 action types)
DICOM device registry (AE Title validation, C-ECHO, soft delete)
DICOMweb-specific rate limiter (120 req/60s per user)
All DICOMweb routes gated by imaging_view permission
STOW-RS and demo upload gated by imaging_admin permission
Audit compliance endpoints (events, stats, verify, export)
UI: break-glass banner/request, admin Devices tab, admin Audit tab
